scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @village-siege/shared && npm run dev --workspace @village-siege/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @village-siege/shared && npm run build --workspace @village-siege/server && npm run build --workspace @village-siege/client
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:ops && npm run validate:directional-art && npm run build
scripts.smoke:multiplayer:local: npm run build --workspace @village-siege/shared && npm run build --workspace @village-siege/server && node scripts/multiplayer-smoke-local.mjs
scripts.smoke:multiplayer:recovery:local: npm run build --workspace @village-siege/shared && npm run build --workspace @village-siege/server && node scripts/multiplayer-recovery-smoke-local.mjs
scripts.smoke:multiplayer:adverse:local: npm run build --workspace @village-siege/shared && npm run build --workspace @village-siege/server && node scripts/multiplayer-adverse-smoke-local.mjs
